song.title: Flowing Out
song.author: Church in Columbus
song.lyrics: [V1] .D A7 Oh! Lord move my stones away, . G D That Your life may flow each day. . Em D And form a spring which never ends, .A A river to reach all men. . D A7 Oh! Lord may Your flow of life, . G D Fill our hearts that we may be . Em D Refreshed and full of joy until . A D Your sweetness will flow to all.|| . G D Oh! Lord may Your almighty flow, .G A D Water the thirsty ground. . G A And make the desert land rejoice . G A The barren earth to bloom. . D A Streams in the desert flow, . G D Fruits of life abundant grow. . Em D And everything around shall live, . E D Wherever the river comes.
